text: I uploaded a screenshot, I apologize I forgot to do that. These are 10GB cards, the Chelsio T-520-SO cards, but they are not recognized as a 10GB NIC, just 1GB. Not sure what is causing this to happen, however, this was not an issue until the system was upgraded to the latest version of pfsense based on FreeBSD 11.2
